details.test: Task 1: Schedule adult comprehensive exam at Main Street next Wednesday morning
Task 2: Book pediatric eye exam with highest-rated VisionPlus Gold doctor near 30309
Task 3: Select mid-priced men's rectangular frame and add to cart
Task 4: Order 3-month supply of ClearView Daily contact lenses and checkout
Task 5: Find clinic with BrightVision PPO and evening hours, then open scheduling
Task 6: Estimate Family Value Package for 2 adults and 1 child with basic frames
Task 7: Subscribe to weekly digital eye strain newsletter
Task 8: Find recent blue light glasses article and get shareable link
Task 9: Enable accessibility settings and send contact message
